name: Matter Management
description: Auxiliary matter management surface for tracking legal matters across lifecycle stages, inspecting matter detail with activity and billing context.

page_briefs.matters: Matter list page. Top region hosts a data-table listing matters with columns for matter name, client, practice area, responsible attorney, status, opened date, and billable hours. Below, a kanban-board pivots the same matters into lifecycle columns — intake, active, on-hold, closed — letting users drag matters across stages.
page_briefs.matter-detail: Single matter detail page. Top region renders a matter-card summarizing client, opposing party, jurisdiction, responsible team, fee arrangement, and current status. Below left, an activity-feed captures filings, emails, calls, and notes in reverse chronological order. Below right, a timeline visualizes key milestones — filing deadlines, hearing dates, depositions — across the matter lifecycle.
